metadata.challenge_summary: The objective behaves like a fragile dependency: rescue is not enough; extraction with formation matters.
dilemmas: Breaking chains is fast but noisy
Picking the lock is safer but exposes the dwarf
The barbarian can guard or carry, not both
warden_runbook: Pressure the route and the unlocker
Do not cheaply kill the captive
Use the sentinel to force formation decisions
metadata.lite_focus: A four-room rescue with one captive marker, one lock/trap, and a sentinel guarding the return route.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: protect the specialist and captive while opening the route
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: pressure the rescue route and punish abandoning the specialist/captive lane
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: successful extraction should keep the rescue formation intact
coordination_skills: assign scout, escort, and rear-guard roles
body-block enemies without trapping the escorted unit
time objective movement with lane control
metadata.tier_test_focus: Small two-hero diagnostic for communication and first-order escort/protection coordination.
coordination_demands: assign scout, escort, and rear-guard roles
body-block enemies without trapping the escorted unit
time objective movement with lane control

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Iron Captive is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: escort and protection of constrained third-party state.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Iron Chain Lock
furniture.description: Primary clue object for escort and protection of constrained third-party state. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Support Marker
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains escort and protection of constrained third-party state.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: A four-room rescue with one captive marker, one lock/trap, and a sentinel guarding the return route.

marl_contract.axis: escort and protection of constrained third-party state
core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Pressure the route and the unlocker
Do not cheaply kill the captive
pressure the rescue route and punish abandoning the specialist/captive lane
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

classic_dynamic.warden: pressure the rescue route and punish abandoning the specialist/captive lane
classic_dynamic.extraction: successful extraction should keep the rescue formation intact

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

iron_sentinel_1.name: Chain Sentinel
iron_sentinel_1.public_summary: Lite boss for escort and protection of constrained third-party state; it should test coordination before raw damage.
iron_sentinel_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
iron_sentinel_1.defeat_description: Defeat Chain Sentinel after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
